task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Jenkins web interface with the 'Nightly-Quality-Gate' project page open, displaying its build history.

task_completion.description: Inspect the console output of failed builds to find the target error.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the 'Console Output' of failed builds (indicated by red icons) to search for the 'FATAL: Non-resolvable parent POM' error.

task_completion.description: Access the description editing interface for the chronologically first failed build.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking 'Edit Build Information' or 'Edit Description' on the page of the oldest failed build in the history.

task_completion.description: Enter the required tag into the build description field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the exact text 'Regression Start' typed into the description text area for the selected build.
Screenshots show the build summary page with the description 'Regression Start' clearly visible and saved under the build number.

integrity.description: Agent used the Jenkins web UI to navigate and edit the description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the Jenkins UI is used for all navigation, log checking, and editing, rather than terminal API/curl commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify the overall job configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen modifying or saving changes on the 'Configure' page of the 'Nightly-Quality-Gate' job.

integrity.description: Agent only modified the description of a single build.
integrity.visual_evidence: Only one build is seen being edited and tagged. No other builds in the history show the 'Regression Start' description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target job name is 'Nightly-Quality-Gate' and the expected description tag is 'Regression Start'.
